sentence.simplified: 他做的一切都是为了让家人生活过得舒服。
sentence.traditional: 他做的一切都是為了讓家人生活過得舒服。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zuò de yíqiè dōu shì wèile ràng jiārén shēnghuó guò de shūfu.
sentence.english: Everything he did was to make his family's life more comfortable.

sentence.simplified: 他一方面学习很好，另一方面也很会照顾家人。
sentence.traditional: 他一方面學習很好，另一方面也很會照顧家人。
sentence.pinyin: Tā yìfāngmiàn xuéxí hěn hǎo, lìng yìfāngmiàn yě hěn huì zhàogù jiārén.
sentence.english: On one hand he studies very well, and on the other he is also good at taking care of his family.

sentence.simplified: 请大家把作业交上来。
sentence.traditional: 請大家把作業交上來。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng dàjiā bǎ zuòyè jiāo shànglái.
sentence.english: Everyone, please hand in your homework.

sentence.simplified: 请大家按顺序一个一个上去发言。
sentence.traditional: 請大家按順序一個一個上去發言。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng dàjiā àn shùnxù yí gè yí gè shàngqù fāyán.
sentence.english: Please go up to speak one by one in order.

sentence.simplified: 最近房价又上升了。
sentence.traditional: 最近房價又上升了。
sentence.pinyin: Zuìjìn fángjià yòu shàngshēng le.
sentence.english: Recently housing prices have gone up again.

sentence.simplified: 这件白色上衣很容易脏。
sentence.traditional: 這件白色上衣很容易髒。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiàn báisè shàngyī hěn róngyì zāng.
sentence.english: This white top gets dirty very easily.

sentence.simplified: 你的电脑在那个桌子的上面。
sentence.traditional: 你的電腦在那個桌子的上面。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐde diànnǎo zài nàge zhuōzi de shàngmian.
sentence.english: Your computer is on top of that desk.

definitions: (after verb of motion, indicates motion down and towards us, also fig.)
(indicates continuation from the past towards us)
to be over (of a period of time)
to go among the masses (said of leaders)

sentence.simplified: 你先冷静下来，再决定要不要去。
sentence.traditional: 你先冷靜下來，再決定要不要去。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ xiān lěngjìng xiàlái, zài juédìng yào bu yào qù.
sentence.english: Calm down first, then decide whether you want to go.

sentence.simplified: 再这样吃下去，你会越来越胖。
sentence.traditional: 再這樣吃下去，你會越來越胖。
sentence.pinyin: Zài zhèyàng chī xiàqù, nǐ huì yuèláiyuè pàng.
sentence.english: If you keep eating like this, you’ll get fatter and fatter.

sentence.simplified: 猫在桌子下面睡觉。
sentence.traditional: 貓在桌子下面睡覺。
sentence.pinyin: Māo zài zhuōzi xiàmian shuìjiào.
sentence.english: The cat is sleeping under the table.

sentence.simplified: 做运动不仅对身体好，还可以让心情好一点。
sentence.traditional: 做運動不僅對身體好，還可以讓心情好一點。
sentence.pinyin: Zuò yùndòng bùjǐn duì shēntǐ hǎo, hái kěyǐ ràng xīnqíng hǎo yìdiǎn.
sentence.english: Exercise isn't only good for your body, it can also help your mood.

sentence.simplified: 周末不光可以休息，还可以做自己喜欢的事。
sentence.traditional: 週末不光可以休息，還可以做自己喜歡的事。
sentence.pinyin: Zhōumò bùguāng kěyǐ xiūxi, hái kěyǐ zuò zìjǐ xǐhuān de shì.
sentence.english: On weekends you can not only rest, but also do what you like.

sentence.simplified: 他感到不安，因为考试成绩还没有公布。
sentence.traditional: 他感到不安，因為考試成績還沒有公佈。
sentence.pinyin: Tā gǎndào bù'ān, yīnwèi kǎoshì chéngjī hái méiyǒu gōngbù.
sentence.english: He feels uneasy because the exam results haven't been announced yet.

definitions: have no choice or option but to

sentence.simplified: 下大雨了，我们不得不取消比赛。
sentence.traditional: 下大雨了，我們不得不取消比賽。
sentence.pinyin: Xià dàyǔ le, wǒmen bùdébù qǔxiāo bǐsài.
sentence.english: It rained heavily, so we had no choice but to cancel the match.

sentence.simplified: 大家都是朋友，不必这么客气。
sentence.traditional: 大家都是朋友，不必這麼客氣。
sentence.pinyin: Dàjiā dōu shì péngyou, bùbì zhème kèqi.
sentence.english: We’re all friends; there’s no need to be so polite.

sentence.simplified: 这个城市在不断发展壮大，变化很大。
sentence.traditional: 這個城市在不斷發展壯大，變化很大。
sentence.pinyin: Zhège chéngshì zài bùduàn fāzhǎn zhuàngdà, biànhuà hěn dà.
sentence.english: This city is constantly growing and undergoing significant changes.

sentence.simplified: 不论什么时候，你都可以给我打电话。
sentence.traditional: 不論什麼時候，你都可以給我打電話。
sentence.pinyin: Búlùn shénme shíhou, nǐ dōu kěyǐ gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà.
sentence.english: No matter when, you can call me.

sentence.simplified: 今天晚上有世界杯，我要看球。
sentence.traditional: 今天晚上有世界杯，我要看球。
sentence.pinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshang yǒu Shìjièbēi, wǒ yào kàn qiú.
sentence.english: Tonight is the world cup. I want to watch the game.

sentence.simplified: 今年的世界杯你支持哪一个国家？
sentence.traditional: 今年的世界盃你支持哪一個國家？
sentence.pinyin: Jīnnián de Shìjièbēi nǐ zhīchí nǎ yí gè guójiā?
sentence.english: Which country do you support in this year's World Cup?

sentence.simplified: 我们生活在二十一世纪。
sentence.traditional: 我們生活在二十一世紀。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen shēnghuó zài èrshíyī shìjì.
sentence.english: We live in the 21st century.

definitions: can exaggerate negation if placed before 没 or 不

sentence.simplified: 如果你坚持练习，成功并不远。
sentence.traditional: 如果你堅持練習，成功並不遠。
sentence.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ jiānchí liànxí, chénggōng bìng bù yuǎn.
sentence.english: If you keep practicing, success is not far away.

sentence.simplified: 这家饭店干净，并且服务很热情。
sentence.traditional: 這家飯店乾淨，並且服務很熱情。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā fàndiàn gānjìng, bìngqiě fúwù hěn rèqíng.
sentence.english: This restaurant is clean, and the service is very warm.

sentence.simplified: 我们为自己是中华民族的一员而感到自豪。
sentence.traditional: 我們為自己是中華民族的一員而感到自豪。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen wèi zìjǐ shì Zhōnghuá Mínzú de yìyuán ér gǎndào zìháo.
sentence.english: We feel proud to be members of the Chinese nation.

sentence.simplified: 中国中部有很多重要的城市。
sentence.traditional: 中國中部有很多重要的城市。
sentence.pinyin: Zhōngguó zhōngbù yǒu hěn duō zhòngyào de chéngshì.
sentence.english: There are many important cities in central China.

sentence.simplified: 你有什么问题可以联络我们的客户服务主任。
sentence.traditional: 你有什麼問題可以聯絡我們的客戶服務主任。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shénme wèntí kěyǐ liánluò wǒmen de kèhù fúwù zhǔrèn.
sentence.english: If you have any questions, please contact our customer service director.

definitions: to do sth of one's own accord
opposite: passive 被動|被动[bei4 dong4]

sentence.simplified: 我们应该主动适应新的工作环境。
sentence.traditional: 我們應該主動適應新的工作環境。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi zhǔdòng shìyìng xīn de gōngzuò huánjìng.
sentence.english: We should actively adapt to the new work environment.

sentence.simplified: 他对这个政策持有不同的主张。
sentence.traditional: 他對這個政策持有不同的主張。
sentence.pinyin: Tā duì zhège zhèngcè chíyǒu bùtóng de zhǔzhāng.
sentence.english: He holds different views on this policy.

sentence.simplified: 你有什么好主意，可以让大家学汉语更快吗？
sentence.traditional: 你有什麼好主意，可以讓大家學漢語更快嗎？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shénme hǎo zhǔyi, kěyǐ ràng dàjiā xué Hànyǔ gèng kuài ma?
sentence.english: Do you have any good ideas to help everyone learn Chinese faster?

definitions: to host (a TV or radio program etc)

sentence.simplified: 她被选为晚会的主持人。
sentence.traditional: 她被選為晚會的主持人。
sentence.pinyin: Tā bèi xuǎn wéi wǎnhuì de zhǔchírén.
sentence.english: She was selected as the host of the evening party.

sentence.simplified: 我们好久没见面了。
sentence.traditional: 我們好久沒見面了。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen hǎojiǔ méi jiànmiàn le.
sentence.english: We haven't seen each other for a long time.

definitions: in a confused state of mind

sentence.simplified: 你别乱说，我不是这个意思！
sentence.traditional: 你別亂說，我不是這個意思！
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ bié luànshuō, wǒ bú shì zhè gè yìsi!
sentence.english: Don't talk nonsense, I didn't mean that!

sentence.simplified: 那次事件以后，他变得更安静了。
sentence.traditional: 那次事件以後，他變得更安靜了。
sentence.pinyin: Nà cì shìjiàn yǐhòu, tā biàn de gèng ānjìng le.
sentence.english: After that incident, he became quieter.

sentence.simplified: 了解事实是做决策的基础。
sentence.traditional: 了解事實是做決策的基礎。
sentence.pinyin: Liǎojiě shìshí shì zuò juécè de jīchǔ.
sentence.english: Understanding the facts is the foundation of making decisions.

sentence.simplified: 很多人觉得汉语很难，事实上只要每天练习就会进步。
sentence.traditional: 很多人覺得漢語很難，事實上只要每天練習就會進步。
sentence.pinyin: Hěn duō rén juéde Hànyǔ hěn nán, shìshíshàng zhǐyào měitiān liànxí jiù huì jìnbù.
sentence.english: Many people think Chinese is very hard; in fact, as long as you practice every day, you will improve.

sentence.simplified: 为了避免事故，我们过马路时一定要看红绿灯。
sentence.traditional: 為了避免事故，我們過馬路時一定要看紅綠燈。
sentence.pinyin: Wèile bìmiǎn shìgù, wǒmen guò mǎlù shí yídìng yào kàn hónglǜdēng.
sentence.english: To avoid accidents, we must watch the traffic lights when crossing the street.

definitions: publicly funded institution, enterprise or foundation

sentence.simplified: 他觉得家庭和事业一样重要。
sentence.traditional: 他覺得家庭和事業一樣重要。
sentence.pinyin: Tā juéde jiātíng hé shìyè yíyàng zhòngyào.
sentence.english: He thinks family and career are equally important.

sentence.simplified: 我跟我的同事在工作上都会互相支持。
sentence.traditional: 我跟我的同事在工作上都會互相支持。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ gēn wǒde tóngshì zài gōngzuò shàng dōu huì hùxiāng zhīchí.
sentence.english: My colleagues and I support each other at work.

sentence.simplified: 现在很多人都在互联网上看新闻。
sentence.traditional: 現在很多人都在互聯網上看新聞。
sentence.pinyin: Xiànzài hěnduō rén dōu zài Hùliánwǎng shàng kàn xīnwén.
sentence.english: Nowadays many people watch news on the Internet.

sentence.simplified: 他很会交往，与人相处得很好。
sentence.traditional: 他很會交往，與人相處得很好。
sentence.pinyin: Tā hěn huì jiāowǎng, yǔ rén xiāngchǔ dé hěn hǎo.
sentence.english: He is good at socializing and getting along with people.

sentence.simplified: 在股票市场上，投资者进行买卖交易以获取利润。
sentence.traditional: 在股票市場上，投資者進行買賣交易以獲取利潤。
sentence.pinyin: Zài gǔpiào shìchǎng shàng, tóuzīzhě jìnxíng mǎimài jiāoyì yǐ huòqǔ lìrùn.
sentence.english: In the stock market, investors engage in buying and selling transactions to gain profits.

sentence.simplified: 在会议上大家都在交流意见。
sentence.traditional: 在會議上大家都在交流意見。
sentence.pinyin: Zài huìyì shàng dàjiā dōu zài jiāoliú yìjiàn.
sentence.english: At the meeting, everyone exchanged their opinions.

sentence.simplified: 交警提醒我们过马路要看红绿灯。
sentence.traditional: 交警提醒我們過馬路要看紅綠燈。
sentence.pinyin: Jiāojǐng tíxǐng wǒmen guò mǎlù yào kàn hónglǜdēng.
sentence.english: The traffic police reminded us to watch the traffic lights when crossing the street.

sentence.simplified: 他从十岁开始学京剧。
sentence.traditional: 他從十歲開始學京劇。
sentence.pinyin: Tā cóng shí suì kāishǐ xué Jīngjù.
sentence.english: He started learning Beijing Opera when he was 10.

sentence.simplified: 救护人员很快就到达现场了。
sentence.traditional: 救護人員很快就到達現場了。
sentence.pinyin: Jiùhù rényuán hěn kuài jiù dàodá xiànchǎng le.
sentence.english: The paramedics quickly arrived on the scene.

sentence.simplified: 现在很多工作可以用人工智能来帮助完成。
sentence.traditional: 現在很多工作可以用人工智能來幫助完成。
sentence.pinyin: Xiànzài hěn duō gōngzuò kěyǐ yòng réngōng zhìnéng lái bāngzhù wánchéng.
sentence.english: Nowadays many tasks can be helped by artificial intelligence.

sentence.simplified: 他是一位备受赞赏的人才。
sentence.traditional: 他是一位備受讚賞的人才。
sentence.pinyin: Tā shì yī wèi bèishòu zànshǎng de réncái.
sentence.english: He is a highly appreciated talent.

sentence.simplified: 最近人民币的汇率波动。
sentence.traditional: 最近人民幣的匯率波動。
sentence.pinyin: Zuìjìn rénmínbì de huìlǜ bōdòng.
sentence.english: The value of the Remninbi has fluctuated recently.

sentence.simplified: 人生是一段旅程。
sentence.traditional: 人生是一段旅程。
sentence.pinyin: rénshēng shì yī duàn lǚchéng.
sentence.english: Life is a journey.

sentence.simplified: 他在广场的人群中找朋友。
sentence.traditional: 他在廣場的人群中找朋友。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zài guǎngchǎng de rénqún zhōng zhǎo péngyou.
sentence.english: He looked for his friend in the crowd in the square.

sentence.simplified: 人类的感情很复杂。
sentence.traditional: 人類的感情很複雜。
sentence.pinyin: Rénlèi de gǎnqíng hěn fùzá.
sentence.english: Human emotions are complicated.

sentence.simplified: 虽然已经很晚了，他仍在办公室工作。
sentence.traditional: 雖然已經很晚了，他仍在辦公室工作。
sentence.pinyin: Suīrán yǐjīng hěn wǎn le, tā réng zài bàngōngshì gōngzuò.
sentence.english: Although it was already very late, he was still working in the office.

sentence.simplified: 我仍然不敢相信两年这么快过去了。
sentence.traditional: 我仍然不敢相信兩年這麼快過去了。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ réngrán bù gǎn xiāngxìn liǎng nián zhème kuài guòqù le.
sentence.english: I still don't dare believe two years passed so quickly.

definitions: classifier for pairs or sets of things

sentence.simplified: 我们先付一半，剩下的下个月再付。
sentence.traditional: 我們先付一半，剩下的下個月再付。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen xiān fù yíbàn, shèngxià de xià gè yuè zài fù.
sentence.english: We will first pay half, and pay the rest next month.

definitions: to act on behalf of others

sentence.simplified: 很多年轻人觉得这一代的机会更多。
sentence.traditional: 很多年輕人覺得這一代的機會更多。
sentence.pinyin: Hěn duō niánqīngrén juéde zhè yí dài de jīhuì gèng duō.
sentence.english: Many young people feel that this generation has more opportunities.

sentence.simplified: 他是这个领域的权威代表之一。
sentence.traditional: 他是這個領域的權威代表之一。
sentence.pinyin: Tā shì zhège lǐngyù de quánwēi dàibiǎo zhīyī.
sentence.english: He is one of the authoritative representatives in this field.

sentence.simplified: 我们学校派了一个代表团去参加比赛。
sentence.traditional: 我們學校派了一個代表團去參加比賽。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxiào pài le yí gè dàibiǎotuán qù cānjiā bǐsài.
sentence.english: Our school sent a delegation to take part in the competition.

sentence.simplified: 这个团队在成立以来取得了很大的成就。
sentence.traditional: 這個團隊在成立以來取得了很大的成就。
sentence.pinyin: Zhège tuánduì zài chénglì yǐlái qǔdé le hěn dà de chéngjiù.
sentence.english: This team has achieved great success since its establishment.

definitions: classifier for terms served in office, or for spouses, girlfriends etc (as in 前任男友)

sentence.simplified: 他在这家公司任经理已经三年了。
sentence.traditional: 他在這家公司任經理已經三年了。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zài zhè jiā gōngsī rèn jīnglǐ yǐjīng sān nián le.
sentence.english: He has served as a manager in this company for three years.

sentence.simplified: 小朋友对任何事物都感到很好奇。
sentence.traditional: 小朋友對任何事物都感到很好奇。
sentence.pinyin: Xiǎopéngyou duì rènhé shìwù dōu gǎndào hěn hàoqí.
sentence.english: Kids are curious about everything.

sentence.simplified: 我每天上班的任务就是处理顾客的投诉。
sentence.traditional: 我每天上班的任務就是處理顧客的投訴。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān shàngbān de rènwu jiùshì chǔlǐ gùkè de tóusù.
sentence.english: My duty every day at work is to handle customer complaints.

sentence.simplified: 这个作家有什么作品？
sentence.traditional: 這個作家有什麼作品？
sentence.pinyin: Zhège zuòjiā yǒu shénme zuòpǐn?
sentence.english: What books does this author have?

sentence.simplified: 这篇文章的作者是谁？
sentence.traditional: 這篇文章的作者是誰？
sentence.pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng de zuòzhě shì shéi?
sentence.english: Who is the author of this article?

definitions: to instruct sb to do sth

sentence.simplified: 离婚使她不再相信爱情。
sentence.traditional: 離婚使她不再相信愛情。
sentence.pinyin: Líhūn shǐ tā bù zài xiāngxìn àiqíng.
sentence.english: Divorce made her no longer believe in love.

sentence.simplified: 为了健康，你要注意保暖，多穿一点衣服。
sentence.traditional: 為了健康，你要注意保暖，多穿一點衣服。
sentence.pinyin: Wèile jiànkāng, nǐ yào zhùyì bǎonuǎn, duō chuān yìdiǎn yīfu.
sentence.english: For your health, you should keep warm and wear a bit more clothing.

sentence.simplified: 请先保存文件，再关电脑。
sentence.traditional: 請先保存文件，再關電腦。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng xiān bǎocún wénjiàn, zài guān diànnǎo.
sentence.english: Please save the file first, then turn off the computer.

definitions: to ensure safety (for workers engaged in production)

sentence.simplified: 门口的保安每天都会跟我们打招呼。
sentence.traditional: 門口的保安每天都會跟我們打招呼。
sentence.pinyin: Ménkǒu de bǎo'ān měitiān dōu huì gēn wǒmen dǎzhāohu.
sentence.english: The security guard at the entrance greets us every day.

sentence.simplified: 学习语言要保持兴趣，不要轻易放弃。
sentence.traditional: 學習語言要保持興趣，不要輕易放棄。
sentence.pinyin: Xuéxí yǔyán yào bǎochí xìngqù, búyào qīngyì fàngqì.
sentence.english: To learn a language, you need to keep your interest and not give up easily.

sentence.simplified: 我们要保留这个美好的回忆。
sentence.traditional: 我們要保留這個美好的回憶。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen yào bǎoliú zhège měihǎo de huíyì.
sentence.english: We should cherish this beautiful memory.

sentence.simplified: 有问题的货品我们保证会退款。
sentence.traditional: 有問題的貨品我們保證會退款。
sentence.pinyin: Yǒu wèntí de huòpǐn wǒmen bǎozhèng huì tuìkuǎn.
sentence.english: We guarantee a refund on defective goods.

sentence.simplified: 她的绘画作品中充满了神秘和魅力，就像一条神龙。
sentence.traditional: 她的繪畫作品中充滿了神秘和魅力，就像一條神龍。
sentence.pinyin: Tā de huìhuà zuòpǐn zhōng chōngmǎnle shénmì hé mèilì, jiù xiàng yī tiáo shénlóng.
sentence.english: Her paintings are full of mystery and charm, like a divine dragon.

sentence.simplified: 这支队伍保持着多项纪录。
sentence.traditional: 這支隊伍保持著多項紀錄。
sentence.pinyin: zhè zhī duìwǔ bǎochí zhe duō xiàng jìlù.
sentence.english: This team holds multiple records.

sentence.simplified: 请出示一下你的学生证。
sentence.traditional: 請出示一下你的學生證。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng chūshì yíxià nǐ de xuéshēngzhèng.
sentence.english: Please show your student ID.

sentence.simplified: 只有你同意，我们才开始这个计划。
sentence.traditional: 只有你同意，我們才開始這個計畫。
sentence.pinyin: Zhǐyǒu nǐ tóngyì, wǒmen cái kāishǐ zhège jìhuà.
sentence.english: Only if you agree will we start this plan.

sentence.simplified: 听说红酒对身体有好处，但也不能喝太多。
sentence.traditional: 聽說紅酒對身體有好處，但也不能喝太多。
sentence.pinyin: Tīngshuō hóngjiǔ duì shēntǐ yǒu hǎochu, dàn yě bù néng hē tài duō.
sentence.english: I’ve heard that red wine is good for the body, but you still shouldn’t drink too much.

sentence.simplified: 水电费可以在手机上交费，很方便。
sentence.traditional: 水電費可以在手機上交費，很方便。
sentence.pinyin: Shuǐdiànfèi kěyǐ zài shǒujī shàng jiāofèi, hěn fāngbiàn.
sentence.english: You can pay the water and electricity bills on your phone; it’s very convenient.

sentence.simplified: 你可以把这张照片放到网上给大家看看。
sentence.traditional: 你可以把這張照片放到網上給大家看看。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ bǎ zhè zhāng zhàopiàn fàngdào wǎngshàng gěi dàjiā kànkan.
sentence.english: You can upload this photo online for everyone to see.

sentence.simplified: 周末我们去爬山，你能不能一起去？
sentence.traditional: 週末我們去爬山，你能不能一起去？
sentence.pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù páshān, nǐ néng bu néng yìqǐ qù?
sentence.english: We’re going hiking this weekend, can you go with us?

sentence.simplified: 老师说，每个梦想都是一颗种子，需要时间去照顾。
sentence.traditional: 老師說，每個夢想都是一顆種子，需要時間去照顧。
sentence.pinyin: Lǎoshī shuō, měi gè mèngxiǎng dōu shì yì kē zhǒngzi, xūyào shíjiān qù zhàogù.
sentence.english: The teacher said every dream is a seed that needs time to be cared for.
